refusal: I refuse the default next local repair: authorizing another temporary paper release slip for this load while the release-owner question remains unresolved.
mechanism_reframe: The repeated mechanism is that shipment urgency keeps converting an unresolved control gap into a one-load exception. Each exception moves the tanker but preserves the missing release authority and inspection-record rule, so the same record gap returns on the next shipment.
upstream_next_action: Escalate the 17:00 tanker constraint to the water authority and the accountable release-control decision owner now, so the release-control authority is decided before this load moves; tomorrow's 09:00 review should confirm or revise that control decision, not substitute for it.
